verses.text: Samuel in Saul kiangah, “ Topa in ama mi Israel-te tungah kumpi dingin nang sathau a nilh dingin kei hong sawl hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Topa' thugen ngai in
Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Amaute Egypt panin hong paikhiat lai-in amaute in lampi-ah Israel-te a nialna uh hangin Amalek mite gim ka pia ding hi
Tu-in pai-in Amalek mite vatgawp un la, amaute' neih khempeuh susiamang khin un. Amaute sitloin, numei leh pasal, naupang leh nawine laite, bawngtal leh tuu, kalaoh leh la, that un,’ ci hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Saul in Israel mite sam a, Telaim-ah khe galkap mi tul zanih leh Judah mi tul sawm kaikhawm hi
Tua ciangin Amalek khuapi-ah Saul hong pai-in kuam sungah pangsim hi

Tua ciangin Saul in Ken mite kiangah, “Pai un; kihemkhia un. Amalek mite lak panin paikhiasuk un. Tua hi kei leh amaute tawh note kong susiakhawm khading hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt panin Israel-te hong paikhiat lai-in amaute khempeuh tungah migitna na lak uh hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Amalek mite lak panin Ken mite kihemkhia uh hi
Tua ciangin Saul in Havilah panin Egypt nisuahna lama om Shur ciangdong Amalek-te zo hi
Amah in Amalek-te' kumpipa Agag a hingin man a, mi khempeuh namsau tawh thatmang hi

Ahih hangin Saul leh mite in Agag, leh a hoihpen tuute, bawngtalte, gannote, tuunote leh a hoih khempeuh khawi uh a, tuate thatmang khinlo uh hi. A kisimmawh bangmah a manlo khempeuh amaute in thatmang uh hi
Topa' thu Samuel tungah hong tung hi
“Kumpi-in Saul ka koih ka kisik hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah pen keimah zuihna panin kihei kik a, ka thupiaknate semlo hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Samuel heh hi; zan tawntung Topa' tungah kiko hi

Tua ciangin Saul a dawn dingin zingsangin Samuel tho baih hi. Samuel kiangah, “Karmel-ah Saul hong pai hi. Amah in ama-a' dingin phawkna mual khat phutin, kihei-in paisuak a, Gilgal-ah paisuk hi,” kici hi
Tua ciangin Samuel hong pai a, Saul in ama kiangah, “ Topa' thupha na tungah hong tung hen. Topa' thupiakna ka sem khin hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Samuel in, “Tua ahih leh ka bila tuu hamna leh ka zak bawngtalte' hamna bang ahi hiam?” a ci hi

Saul in, “Amaute in Amalek-te kiang panin tuate hong paipih uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa na Pasian tungah biakna piakna dingin a limci pen tuute leh bawngtalte mite in sit uh a, a dangte ka thatmang khin uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Samuel in Saul kiangah, “Khawl in! Topa in tuzanin kei kiangah hong gen thu nang kiangah kong gen ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amah in Samuel kiangah, “Hong gen in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Samuel in, “Nang na kineu ngaihsut hun a om hangin, tu-in nang pen Israel minamte' lutang hilo na hi hiam? Topa in Israel-te tungah kumpi-in nang sathau hong nilh hi
Topa in nasem dingin nang hong sawl a, ‘Pai in; mawhnei Amalek mite va susiamang in la, amaute a bei mateng va simgawp in,’ hong ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin Topa' thu manglo na hi hiam? Bang hangin vankinusiate bawhin Topa' muhna-ah a sia gamta na hi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Saul in Samuel kiangah, “Keimah in Topa' thu ka mang a, Topa in hong sawl nasepna-ah pai khinin, Amalek kumpipa Agag kong ciahpih khin a, Amalek mite ka susiamang khin hi
Ahih hangin mite in a kinusiate, tuute leh bawngtalte, suksiat dinga a ki-ap na hoihpente Gilgal-ah Topa na Pasian piak dingin la uh hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Samuel in, “ Topa in meihal biaknate leh biakpiaknate Topa' thu man' ding zahin deih ahi hiam? En in, biakpiakna sangin thu man' ding hoihzaw a, tuutal thaute sangin thu ngaih ding hoihzaw hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh lehdona pen aisan mawhna bangmah hi a, lungkhauhna pen mawhna leh milim biakna mah a bang ahi hi. Nangmah in Topa' thu nial khin na hih manin, amah in zong kumpi hihna pan nang hong nolh khin hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Saul in Samuel kiangah, “Ka khial khin hi; bang hang hiam cih leh keimah in mite kihta-in amau' thu mangkha ka hih manin Topa' thupiakna leh nangma thute ka palsat khin hi
Tua ahih ciangin tu-in kong thum hi; ka khialhna hong maisak in la, Topa ka biaktheihna dingin kei hong lehzuihkik in,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Samuel in Saul kiangah, “Nang tawh kong kilehkik kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in Topa' thu na nial khin a, Israel-te' tungah kumpi hihna panin Topa in nang hong nolh khin hi,” a ci hi
A paikhia dingin Samuel a kihei laitakin Saul in a puantualpi mongin len a, a puan kikek hi
Tua ciangin Samuel in ama kiangah, “ Topa in Israel-te' kumpi gam nang' tung panin tuni-in balkhia-in nang sangin a hoihzaw na vengpa tungah pia khin hi
Israel-te' minthang Pasian in zong zuau genlo ding a, zong kisiklo ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh a kisik dingin amah mi hilo hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amah in, “Ka khial khin hi; ahi zongin tu-in keima mi upate mai leh Israel-te' mai-ah kei hong pahtawi in la, Topa na Pasian ka biaktheihna dingin kei hong zuikik in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Saul' nung zui-in Samuel kilehkik a, Saul in Topa a bia hi

Tua ciangin Samuel in, “Amalek-te' kumpi Agag hih lai ka kiangah hong paipih in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Agag launa lin'na tawh ama kiangah hong pai hi. Agag in, “Sih ding lungkhamna hong tung taktak ta hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Samuel in, “Na namsau in nute ta bei-in a bawl mah bangin na nu zong ta bei hi ta ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Samuel in Topa' mai Gilgal-ah Agag a semnen hi
Tua ciangin Ramah-ah Samuel pai a, Gibeah-a a inn-ah Saul zong a ciahto hi
Samuel in ama sih ni dong Saul mukiklo a, ahih hangin Saul' hangin Samuel a dah hi. Israel-te tungah kumpi-in Saul a koih manin Topa kisik hi.
